title: campylospermum likimiense
intro: Campylospermum likimiense is a species of plant in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the Likimi tree, native to the tropical forests of Madagascar. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, allowing it to be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Campylospermum likimiense include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
